_note: n8n workflow AkiFmromoDkmsh39 — 'SyncView Calendar — Linear Reconcile Trigger'. Fires every 10 min and POSTs a GitHub workflow_dispatch to run .github/workflows/linear-sync-reconcile.yml (workflow id 296618163) in apply mode. This is the convergence backbone's reliable scheduler: GitHub's own */10 cron is throttled to ~3.4h on shared runners, so dropped Linear<->card sync events stayed visible for hours; n8n's scheduleTrigger fires dependably, restoring a true ~10-min heal. The tested reconcile logic stays in the GitHub Action (single source of truth). Auth: Header Auth credential 'GitHub PAT - reconcile' (fygMapRRjtItIsaE) = 'Authorization: Bearer <fine-grained PAT, repo client-analytics, Actions: read/write>'. See LINEAR_DRIFT_INCIDENT_2026-06-19.md.
name: SyncView Calendar — Linear Reconcile Trigger
